title: Overseas payment
subTitle: Safer cloud storage
desc: Record the screen as soon as it moves, store it in real-time in the cloud, and achieve precise positioning in seconds without worrying. Even if the device is damaged, stolen, or disconnected, historical recordings can still be viewed. No more video loss caused by storage card failure or camera theft.
desc1: Unlimited storage space in the cloud, no longer subject to frustrating local storage limitations
desc2: Strictly follow industry security standards and never compromise your privacy for any reason. The data transmission between your device and the cloud is double encrypted end-to-end
subTitle3: Cloud storage compared to SD card storage
text: I am limited to macro scenery
